name: Happiness Trio
overview: "Happiness Trio" is an intimate relationship observational reality show launched by Tencent Video. The program focuses on celebrity couples at different stages of marriage, using a no-task, no-intervention filming approach to document their everyday lives in a private space, showcasing the authentic interactions and lived-in warmth of marital relationships.

trailers.title: 完整版第1期：三组夫妻入住！吴京何猷君分享艰难追妻路！丨《幸福三重奏S3》Happiness Trio S3 EP1 FULL
